title: Happy Customer - Service Compliment
description: A customer is calling simply to compliment a previous representative and ask a very simple account question.

persona.name: Emma
persona.goal: Leave a compliment and check their account balance

background_context: The customer had a great experience last week with an agent named 'John'. She wants to make sure John gets recognized, and she also wants to know her current reward points balance.
success_criteria: Assure the customer the feedback will be passed on
Provide the requested account information quickly
Maintain a warm and friendly tone
common_mistakes: Rushing through the compliment to get to the account question
Forgetting to pass on the feedback
